name: Ancient Gear Engineer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械工兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアエンジニア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Negate any Trap effects that target this card, and if you do, destroy that Trap Card. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card attacked: Target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target.
mnst_eff: Negate any Trap effects that target this card, and if you do, destroy that Trap Card. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card attacked: Target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target.
eff: Negate any Trap effects that target this card, and if you do, destroy that Trap Card. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap Cards until the end of the Damage Step. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card attacked: Target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duel Academy Box

mst: Negates the effects of Trap Cards
